mapper.select: SELECT s.SKILL_NAME AS skillName, us.USER_LEVEL AS skillLevel FROM USER_SKILL us INNER JOIN SKILL s ON us.SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID WHERE us.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_SKILL (US_ID, USER_ID, SKILL_ID, USER_LEVEL) VALUES (USER_SKILL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{skillId}, #{skillLevel})
mapper.select: SELECT SKILL_ID, SKILL_NAME FROM SKILL ORDER BY SKILL_NAME
